name: zfmv_script_begin_current_action
description: zFMV_Script::BeginCurrentAction primes the FMV surface state, initializes the FMV sample set, resets keyboard transition state, stores the start timestamp, and begins the current action at relative time zero.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the null-current early return, primary-surface-to-FX state handoff, FMV sample-set initialization, timestamp copy, and current-action Begin dispatch with relative time zero. Keyboard reset is covered by its own accepted functional target and is kept disabled in this smoke to avoid DirectInput provider setup.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the FMV script source cluster and virtual-call codegen.
